headline: Vistra Corp. (VST) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
summary: Vistra (VST) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +29.63% and +3.54%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Tranche Update on Vistra Corp.'s Equity Buyback Plan announced on October 12, 2021.
summary: From January 1, 2026 to March 31, 2026, the company has repurchased 2,373,546 shares, representing 0.7% for $379.34 million. With this, the company has completed the repurchase of 168,279,522 shares,...
